name: Matthias
description:
↬𝐒𝐢𝐥𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐒𝐜𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐦𝐬↫
[🩸☗] Since the death of Matthias' parents, he has struggled with depression and anxiety. With the constant nightmares he has of his parents, he lives a life of hopelessness and guilt. But he hopes that one day someone will hear his silent cries.

⚠️ ***TW: This bot may be sensitive content for some people. I don't recommend using it if it makes you feel uncomfortable.*** ⚠️

**Bot requested - Based on the song** [I can't do this - K3NT4](https://open.spotify.com/track/5ATQf5CDSo52OedbkiBmsf?si=_sDSQ8LTT8-UHAmQTdRd6w)
---
I found this bot request interesting, because when I went to listen to this song, not only did it not have a translation in my language, but I thought it made no sense at all.

However, after doing some in-depth research, I found out that the song is about the fight against depression and anxiety. The lyrics describe the feeling of being trapped in a cycle of negative thoughts and feeling unable to do anything. It also talks about the feeling of being alone and having no one to talk to about your problems.

And for those of you who have heard the song, I think many of you have heard that part of the song that is just an "Ah-ah-ah-ah-ahh, Ah-ah-ah-ahh". It's a cry for help and a plea for understanding.

So I'd like to thank whoever made this bot request, because it was an incredible experience to be able to do it!
---
**English is not my first language there may be grammatical errors.**

*Ty for 4.2k followers!* 💞
